infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Clocked uses your location to show nearby courses first.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Clocked uses Face ID to keep your account secure.

infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Clocked saves your Clocked Score share card to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Clocked may use the microphone when recording video content.
